mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_AUTH WHERE DELETED = 0
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
SELECT SEQ, NAME, SORTING, CREATE_IDX, CREATE_DATETIME, UPDATE_IDX, UPDATE_DATETIME, DELETE_IDX, DELETE_DATETIME, DELETED FROM TB_AUTH WHERE SEQ = #{seq} AND DELETED = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_AUTH (NAME, SORTING, CREATE_IDX, CREATE_DATETIME, DELETED) VALUES (#{name}, #{sorting}, #{createIdx}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_AUTH SET NAME = #{name}, SORTING = #{sorting}, UPDATE_IDX = #{updateIdx}, UPDATE_DATETIME = NOW() WHERE SEQ = #{seq}

UPDATE TB_AUTH SET DELETED = 1, DELETE_IDX = #{deleteIdx}, DELETE_DATETIME = NOW() WHERE SEQ IN
#{seq}
